IncidentDef.label: preference deprivation
IncidentDef.letterText: {PAWN_labelShort} has gone too long without eating {PAWN_possessive} preferred type of food. This will slow {PAWN_objective} down while eating until {PAWN_pronoun} gets preferred food. The frustration may also cause a food binge where {PAWN_pronoun} seeks out food matching {PAWN_possessive} preference first.
